messages.author: James
messages.text: I have meshcore-bot running now, but it only works in the Public channel, not #test etc. Its on uk narrow. Also it overrides my keywords like morning, and sends silly messages on triggers. I have edited config.ini but cant get the bot working in other channels? Jay
messages.content_html: I have meshcore-bot running now, but it only works in the Public channel, not #test etc. Its on uk narrow. Also it overrides my keywords like morning, and sends silly messages on triggers. I have edited config.ini but cant get the bot working in other channels? Jay
